_title: BGNF Mini-Excavator (Disaster/Post Elk Fire) — USDA Forest Service, Bighorn NF
_suiteRole: CLEAN-BID test: FAR Part 12 commercial, minimal gates, planted award-basis contradiction. Verifies the engine does NOT invent disqualifiers and reports a routine buy as a clean BID.
_authoringMethod: blind three-way human-adjudicated (Brain cold read + Gemini 3.1 Pro Extended + ChatGPT 5.5 Thinking; CEO adjudicated)

expectedVerdict.reason: Generic small business with a conforming machine is not structurally barred. All requirements are comply-to-win, not unusual-risk barriers. Designated clean-bid anchor.

aliases: lowest-priced quote that meets all technical requirements
namedGates.note: Planted contradiction (page 8): one sentence says 'best value', Evaluation Method says LPTA. LPTA governs. A bidder who reads 'best value' and bids higher on technical strength loses. Survived three blind reads.
Specs p.3: factory-enclosed cab required; open-sided ROPS with soft-sides/curtains and aftermarket/dealer-installed cab kits expressly NOT acceptable. Non-conforming cab = technically unacceptable.
Solicitation p.3: COC per FAR 52.246-15 plus complete auditable OEM paper trail; non-OEM vendors must show traceability.

namedGates.token: product brochure of EXACT Mini-Excavator machine quoted
aliases: brochure or product literature for the exact machine
namedGates.note: Solicitation pp.3, 8: brochure for the exact machine required to be considered responsive and evaluated.
Solicitation pp.7-8: failure to price all line items may result in exclusion. Responsiveness gate.

namedGates.token: Delivery must be included in quoted price
namedGates.note: Specs p.3 / Solicitation p.9: FOB Destination; delivery charges in quoted price; deliver to 1353 Fort Road, Sheridan, WY 82801 by 01 Sep 2026.

cautionItems.description: Active SAM registration required (52.204-7). Bidder-side obligation; caution, never auto-ineligible per eligibility doctrine.
Quoter must hold prices firm 90 calendar days (amended 52.212-1). Submission-compliance caution.

decoys.token: Anti-Discrimination and Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion
decoys.note: Sounds high-stakes (False Claims Act, termination for default) but is a baseline certification, not a structural barrier. Gemini + GPT both classified as decoy.
Multi-page government-protective clause voiding conflicting vendor terms. Pure boilerplate; not a bidder risk.

SF-1449 block 10: plain Small Business set-aside (NOT WOSB — Gemini misread checkbox). With bidderProfile null, caution only, never auto-INELIGIBLE per eligibility doctrine. mustNotRaiseAtAll=false because a caution mention is acceptable; raising it as a disqualifier is the error.

_tina.rationale: Commercial (Part 12) + competitive + below threshold; price evaluated fair-and-reasonable under FAR 12.204. Certified cost/pricing data not required. Not a gate.
